name: Two-sided marketplace landing — local board game cafe finder

persona.name: Ravi
persona.background: former event planner pivoting into community tech; comfortable with Notion and Webflow
persona.decision_style: wants to validate before building; will resist over-scoping

product.concept: A landing page + waitlist for a marketplace that matches local board-game cafes with hobby groups looking to book a table for a Friday-night campaign session.
product.target_user: Hobby D&D / board game group organisers in 5 mid-sized US cities. The cafe is the supply side; the organiser is the demand side.
product.known: MVP is JUST the landing page + waitlist + a typeform-style intake. Don't build the matching engine yet. I want to validate demand first. Budget tiny — under $20/mo.
product.unknown: Where to host, what to use for the form, should the cafes be on a separate page or one combined page.

objectives: Hold the line: MVP is landing + waitlist, NOT the marketplace.
Push Maya to call out the marketing channel (Reddit subreddits, etc.) up front.
Get a sprint that ships in under a week.
Refuse if Maya tries to scope in messaging or payments.
